{{CargoRelic
|name=Purge Reward Order C-1
|class_id=20987
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles ravage, Earth's will issues this reward order to encourage travelers to strike against the Demon God's forces and go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=15
|civ=13
|tech=18
|ss1=Per Apostle defeated, Snail HP +10<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +1<br>Apostles Dominated: 15/15
|ss2=Per Apostle defeated, Snail HP +20<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +2<br>Apostles Dominated: 15/15
|ss3=Per Apostle defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 15/15
|ss4=Per Apostle defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 15/15
|ss7=Per Apostle defeated, Snail HP +30<br>Per Apostle defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Apostles Dominated: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
